title: amoria fragifera
intro: Amoria fragifera, also known as the strawberry tree or strawberry tree of the Mediterranean, is a flowering evergreen tree or shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amoria fragifera include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, while its berries have been used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Amoria fragifera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
